title: Life Skills Education * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Life Skills Education * AIDS/HIV 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions AIDS/HIV Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADE AIDS PROJECT OUR HOUSE NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSING AND CARE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home support like nursing, therapy, and social work. Helps with health checkups, understanding and taking medicines, and getting support for daily and household tasks. Assists with housing needs, connects people with community resources, and offers counseling and social support. Also teaches life and coping skills and checks home safety. 2727 SE Alder Street Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Individuals diagnosed with HIV Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 346-3851 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSING AND CARE PROGRAM
